examples: Ischemia; Reperfusion; Oligodendrocyte precursor cells; NBQX.
Conclusion The oligodendrocyte in gray matter area had selective vulnerability to ischemic injury.
Mature neural cells after differentiation could express specific antigens of neuron, astrocyte and oligodendrocyte.
